who: sales leaders in marketing agencies processing 10–50 deals/month
offer: For sales leaders in marketing agencies processing 10–50 deals/month, inaccurate forecasts cause missed revenue targets. We provide actionable insights instead of manual spreadsheets and basic CRM tools.
problem: Inability to accurately forecast sales and track pipeline metrics.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for sales leaders seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on related workflows
DM outreach to sales leaders with demo video links
Participate in community forums sharing useful tools
try_it: Let users try pipeline metric tracking and forecast generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video illustrating the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
Facilitate one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
